notes:
The game does launch and load to the main menu under Proton 9.0-1, though while it is loading to the main menu, do NOT tab out or the game will hang and freeze!
EasyAntiCheat does not initialize correctly under Void due to how the game is launched under the Steam Linux Runtime (see https://github.com/void-linux/void-packages/issues/41388 for more information). As such, Sea of Thieves and other games that use EasyAntiCheat will not launch properly and complain that EAC isn't running despite proper installation. The workarounds that I know of are to use the flatpak version of Steam , to use Cronty, or to use this command to launch the game in a shell environment:

<steam path>/reaper -- <steam path>/steam-launch-wrapper -- <proton path>/proton <game path>/SeaOfThieves.exe # %command%

(Note: this command is taken from the aforementioned GitHub issue; I have not been able to get the game to launch past the EAC loader using this command, even with the correct environment variables set on my own installation.)
title: Sea of Thieves: 2024 Edition
